name: PowerPoint Generation Agent
description: An agent that generates structured .pptx slide decks from natural language briefs.

skills.name: Generate PowerPoint Presentation
skills.description: Generates a structured .pptx slide deck based on a natural language brief.
examples: Create a 10-slide pitch deck for a fintech startup targeting seed investors
Make a presentation on the impact of AI in healthcare with 8 slides
Build a company overview deck with problem, solution, market, and team slides
